extraction_notes: The Cutting Room Floor source document contains only development/debug information, level names, and game mechanics. No musical parameters (tempo, key, chord progressions, melodic characteristics) are documented. Sound effects characteristics are not detailed in the available source material. Stage/area names are mentioned (Cicogne/Stork, Riviere/River, Chariot/minecart, Luge/snowsled, Escalier/stairs) but without corresponding audio specifications.
